data.title: 国际服发布 “百花缭乱试胆事件” 网页漫画 Part 1 庆祝 Vol5.2 Part2 更新
data.summary: Sensei! To celebrate the Main Story Vol.5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2 "To You, Who's Trying to Bloom Alo
data.body:
Sensei! To celebrate the Main Story Vol.5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 2 "To You, Who's Trying to Bloom Alone" Part 2 update, we're releasing Part 1 of "Hyakkaryouran Courage Test," a short Hyakkaryouran spin-off webtoon!

Read the new webtoon featuring the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council students embarking on a new adventure!

➡️Details: [官方英文版](https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3199166)
[站内转载](https://kivo.wiki/comic/7)
